layer_1.name: Artifact Existence Validation
details: All 14 cited PIDs verified against volatility3.psscan output
All process names match between findings and psscan
Named pipe diagsvc-22 verified via raw strings extraction (not hallucinated)
Memory offsets not independently verifiable (pslist failed, psscan offsets used)
Note: file paths (C:\windows\subject_srv.exe) verified via strings, not disk

layer_2.name: Temporal Consistency Validation
details: All 11 timeline events in correct chronological order
All timestamps in UTC (consistent with Volatility output)

GAP 1: 96.7 hours between last rundll32 activity (Aug 31 21:07) and RDP user session (Sep 4 21:51). Explanation: attacker maintained persistent beacon via long-running PowerShell/rundll32 processes; next visible activity was when a user logged in via RDP on Sep 4.
GAP 2: 45.8 hours between user RDP session (Sep 4 21:51) and F-Response install (Sep 6 19:37). Explanation: F-Response was deployed by IR team during investigation, unrelated to attack timeline.

layer_3.name: Analytical Coherence Validation
details: Kill chain: 6 phases mapped (Initial Access inferred, all others Tier 1). No impossible gaps.
MITRE ATT&CK mappings verified: T1047 (WMI), T1059.001 (PS), T1055.001 (DLL Injection), T1071.002 (SMB), T1218.011 (Rundll32) — all consistent with observed behavior.
Confidence calibration: Tier 1 findings at HIGH, Tier 3 inferences at MEDIUM or HIGH-with-justification. HT-001 (ACH conclusion) is Tier 3/HIGH — justified by zero-inconsistency ACH result.
Hypothesis testing: 5 hypotheses evaluated including null (H4). H4 eliminated with 6 inconsistencies. H5 (Red Team) genuinely considered.

Senior analyst challenges: 4 challenges addressed — subject_srv.exe reclassified as F-Response, proxy reclassified as corporate PAC, PowerShell ruled out as admin via shellcode evidence, red team scenario evaluated via ACH.
Self-corrections during analysis: 2 reclassifications applied (subject_srv.exe, 172.16.4.10:8080) — caught during Phase 3, not Phase 5.

overall_assessment: Investigation validated across all 3 layers with 0 post-hoc corrections needed. All PIDs verified against psscan. Timeline is chronologically consistent with 2 explained gaps. Kill chain and MITRE mappings are coherent. Two early reclassifications (subject_srv.exe as F-Response, 172.16.4.10 as corporate proxy) demonstrate in-flight self-correction during Phase 3, before formal validation.
